ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the form was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the form was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamic_fields" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dynamic field */,
  "fieldname" TEXT /* Name of the dynamic field */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the dynamic field */,
  "timesUsed" INTEGER /* Number of times the field has been used */,
  "firstUsed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the first usage of the field (in milliseconds) */,
  "lastUsed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last usage of the field (in milliseconds) */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Unique identifier (GUID) for the field */,
  "field_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the field_types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the field type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the field type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_usage" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field usage instance */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the dynamic_fields table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the forms table */,
  "used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dynamic field was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
